channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Makary's exit creates new uncertainty at FDA
item.description: Marty Makary's departure from the Food and Drug Administration may remove one of the Trump administration's lightning rods for controversy. But it won...

item.title: Trump shrugs off rising inflation as war deepens economic spiral
item.description: President Trump flew to Beijing on Tuesday under some of the darkest economic clouds of his political career, leaving behind a country reeling from th...

item.title: Drills, deals and doubts in the Pacific as Trump visits China
item.description: The first half of May is foreshadowing the future of Indo-Pacific security. Why it matters: Long-term competition between the U.S., China and their fr...

item.title: AI executive action stalled by White House infighting
